tools.name: detect_pii
tools.title: Detect PII in text
tools.description: Scan a block of text with Privaro's PII detection engine. Returns detected entities (names, emails, IBAN, DNI, phone, SSN, credit cards, IPs, session IDs, policy numbers) and an optional tokenized/protected version of the text.

text.description: Raw text to scan for sensitive data.

protect.description: If true, also return the text with detected entities replaced by Privaro tokens.

tools.name: protect_text
tools.title: Tokenize sensitive data in text
tools.description: Replace every detected sensitive entity in a block of text with a Privaro token (e.g. [NM-0001], [EM-0001]). Returns the protected text, the token → original value map, detections, and processing time. Use this to sanitize prompts before sending them to an LLM.

tools.name: assess_risk
tools.title: Assess privacy risk of text
tools.description: Score the privacy/compliance risk of a block of text based on detected sensitive entities. Returns a 0–100 risk score, a risk level (none/low/medium/high/critical), and a breakdown by severity and category.

tools.name: recommend_policy
tools.title: Recommend a Privaro policy for a text sample
tools.description: Analyze a text sample and return a suggested Privaro policy: per detected entity type, the recommended action (allow / tokenize / anonymize / block), plus the recommended regulations to enable.

text.description: Representative text sample from the workload.

context.description: Where the sanitized text will be sent. External LLMs get stricter defaults.

tools.name: explain_token
tools.title: Explain a Privaro token
tools.description: Given a Privaro token like [NM-0001] or [BK-0007], return which entity type it represents. Reveal of the original value requires an authenticated request through the Privaro dashboard and is not exposed via MCP.

tools.name: list_entity_types
tools.title: List detectable entity types
tools.description: Return every entity type the Privaro detection engine currently recognizes, with its severity, category, and token prefix.

tools.name: describe_privaro
tools.title: About Privaro
tools.description: Return a structured overview of the Privaro platform: what it does, who it's for, its core components, and useful URLs.

tools.name: list_use_cases
tools.title: List Privaro use cases
tools.description: Return the main industry use cases Privaro is designed for (Legal, Fintech, Healthcare, AI Agents), each with the problem, the Privaro solution, and a reference URL.

tools.name: list_regulations
tools.title: List supported regulations
tools.description: Return the list of privacy and AI regulations Privaro helps organizations comply with (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, LOPDGDD, EU AI Act, SOC 2), including region, scope, and how Privaro supports each.

tools.name: list_ai_providers
tools.title: List supported AI providers
tools.description: Return the list of LLM providers and model families the Privaro AI Proxy can route traffic to, including supported modes (chat, embeddings, images).

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.title: Get Privaro pricing
tools.description: Return Privaro's public pricing plans (Starter, Business, Enterprise), included request volumes, key features, and available add-ons.
